summary: Confirmed B-line onboarding prerequisites for the Buddhavamsa project. The B01-B04 role documents, common rules, and workflow manual are present and aligned after correcting the B00 delegation map so B03 starts from draft3_generated and B04 starts from final_scan_done. Operationally, B-line remains idle because all 208 registered documents are still at source_ready, revisions/ is empty, and handoff/draft3/ contains no handoff JSON files.

issues.detail: Updated ol-desk-crew/ai-agent/company/B00-manager-gyeoljeong/AGENTS.md so the Delegation Map matches the Task Routing section and subordinate agent roles: draft3_generated -> B03, final_scan_done -> B04.
No document is actionable for B01-B04 yet because data/status/*.json reports source_ready for all 208 registered documents.
ol-desk-crew/contents-asset/projects/buddhavamsa/data/revisions/ contains no revision JSON beyond .gitkeep, so no document has reached human_review_ready.
ol-desk-crew/contents-asset/projects/buddhavamsa/handoff/draft3/ contains no draft3 handoff JSON beyond .gitkeep, so B02/B03/B04 must not start.

next_recommended_action: Keep B00 dormant until A-line advances at least one doc_id to draft2_done or human_review_ready. Resume B00 when B01 can prepare revisions, and only route B02 after a human-confirmed handoff/draft3/{doc_id}.json exists and passes validation.
